title: Block Of...
description: Adds new blocks to the game similar to Dried Kelp Block. Those blocks can be used for decoration, storage, fuel etc. purposes.
body:
Still in development, may have bugs!!

 

 

Adds new 34 blocks to the game that can be used for decoration, storage, cooking and fuel purposes.

(For example Leather Block, Potato Block and Charcoal Block.)

 

There are 3 block types in the mod and every one of the can be mined faster with specific tools. (some of them have different tools from their group)

 

Animal Based, Rotten Flesh and Gunpowder = Shovel

 

Plant Based (except Bamboo Block) = Hoe

 

Material Based = Pickaxe

 

Bamboo Block = Axe

 

Magma Cream and Paper = Direct (like Slime Block)

 

Just like Block of Iron and Dried Kelp Block, those blocks are also crafted with 9 of the block's source item and later can be crafted back into 9 pieces of the same item.

                       Recipes

                  FAQ 

(potential questions)

Can I use this mod in X?

Yes. You can use this mod freely in your projects but it would be nice if you credit me :D

 

Will you port this mod to Forge? 

Maybe in the future, but it isn't planned for now.

 

Will you port this mod to -1.17?

Sorry but no.

 

 

 

!!Please Read!!

I am a new developer (if you even can call me a developer :D)  there is a high chance that the mod is going to have bugs. If you find one, please tell me. This way I can fix it and make the project more stable.

 

If you find any bugs or have suggestions please comment to the mods
